title: Indexed WGS region annotation
description: Declare indexed case and ClinVar VCF regions through duckhts.read_bcf. The live application composes assembly-aware allele rows, VEP region batches of at most 200, bounded DuckNNG fanout/retry/cancel, response parsing, ClinVar joining, and SQL reduction. The host owns source paths, identities, extensions, TLS, and network policy.

resolvers.title: DuckHTS read_bcf
resolvers.description: Read an HTS file (VCF/BCF) region into a tidy table via htslib.
